quotedTweet.content:
Hey Bill Vedra…is it really okay that your 911 Dispatchers at the ECC post about where I.C.E. is operating, after hearing about their location over a secured channel in your Comm Center? Really?

And Hadley—you are putting people at risk with your bs. I sincerely hope they come

HOLY SHLIT

911 operator in Cincinnati reportedly DOXXED ICE live location 

This is insane.

She needs to be FIRED and CHARGED immediately @dhsgov

.@billvedra oversees this dept. What’s he doing about it?? @Cincy911
